columns.name: beisenumr
columns.description: Unique identifier for the entry in the Beiseregister

columns.name: korttekst
columns.description: A brief description or label for the entry

columns.name: navn
columns.description: The name of the entity registered in the Beiseregister

columns.name: dose
columns.description: The dose value related to the entry

columns.name: dosering
columns.description: The dosage or concentration value associated with the entry

columns.name: status
columns.description: The current status of the entry in the Beiseregister

columns.name: sorting
columns.description: A value used for sorting purposes within the Beiseregister

columns.name: aktiv
columns.description: Indicator whether the entry is currently active (1) or inactive (0)

columns.name: beisekode
columns.description: A code identifying a specific category or type within the Beiseregister

columns.name: brukerid
columns.description: The identifier of the user who created or last modified the entry in the Beiseregister

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: A timestamp indicating when the entry was created or last updated
